query: 2026 gubernatorial debates scheduled summer 2026 Pennsylvania Shapiro Garrity, Oregon Kotek Drazan, Arizona Hobbs, Wisconsin - any debate before September 2026
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the summary of findings on 2026 gubernatorial debates before September 2026:

**Bottom line: No general-election gubernatorial debate is scheduled before September 2026 in any of the four states.**

- **Oregon (Kotek vs. Drazan):** The only summer debate that was actually scheduled — July 24, 2026, hosted by the Oregon Newspaper Publishers Association — was **declined by Gov. Kotek**. Her own proposed three-debate slate is explicitly framed as **"starting in September."**

- **Pennsylvania (Shapiro vs. Garrity):** Both are willing to debate, but **zero dates are set**. Garrity called for seven debates; no logistics agreed.

- **Arizona (Hobbs vs. TBD):** Primary is **July 21, 2026**, so the GOP nominee isn't even determined yet, and Hobbs has **refused to commit** to a general-election debate until after the primary.

- **Wisconsin (open seat):** Primary is **August 11, 2026**, making a general-election debate before September **structurally impossible** — nominees aren't set until mid-August. Only primary debates have occurred.

All sourcing is current as of June–July 2026.

sources.title: Gov. Kotek won't debate Drazan with Oregon newspaper group
sources.snippet: Kotek declined a debate scheduled for July 24, 2026 at the Salem Convention Center hosted by the Oregon Newspaper Publishers Association, citing a busy summer calendar.

sources.title: RELEASE: Governor Tina Kotek Challenges Senator Christine Drazan to Three Debates Ahead of November Election
sources.snippet: Kotek campaign challenged Drazan to three 60-minute televised debates in Portland, Eugene, and Medford starting in September.

sources.title: Decision 2026: Gov. Kotek challenges Christine Drazan to three televised debates
sources.snippet: Kotek proposes three debates with first round proposed for September.

sources.title: Shapiro and Garrity open to a 2026 PA governor debate
sources.snippet: Both candidates willing to participate in at least one debate; no dates, hosts, or moderators set. First potential PA gubernatorial debate since 2018.

sources.title: Garrity Calls For Seven Debates vs. Shapiro
sources.snippet: Garrity wants seven gubernatorial debates, one in each Pennsylvania media market.

sources.title: Gov. Hobbs criticizes Biggs for avoiding debates while refusing to commit to one herself
sources.snippet: Hobbs has not committed to a general-election debate, saying she will answer questions about it after the primary.

sources.title: 2026 Arizona gubernatorial election
sources.snippet: Primary elections will take place on July 21, 2026; general election November 3, 2026.

sources.title: 2026 Wisconsin gubernatorial election
sources.snippet: Primary elections will be held on August 11, 2026; open seat as Evers declined re-election.

sources.title: 2026 Oregon gubernatorial election
sources.snippet: Kotek vs Drazan rematch; primaries May 19, 2026; general election November 3, 2026.

sources.title: Arizona Clean Elections Commission reveals 2026 debate moderators, schedule
sources.snippet: Clean Elections Commission released 2026 debate schedule ahead of the July 21 primary.

sources.title: Missy Hughes drops out of Wisconsin governor's race, endorses Rodriguez
sources.snippet: Primary date August 11, 2026; general election November 3, 2026; six Democrats and two Republicans on ballot.

key_facts: Oregon: Gov. Tina Kotek DECLINED a debate scheduled for July 24, 2026 hosted by the Oregon Newspaper Publishers Association at the Salem Convention Center (reported June 18, 2026), citing a busy summer calendar.
Oregon: Kotek's campaign (June 11, 2026) challenged Christine Drazan to three 60-minute televised debates in Portland, Eugene, and Medford 'starting in September' - explicitly not before September.

Pennsylvania: Both Josh Shapiro (D) and Stacy Garrity (R) say they are willing to debate at least once, but as of late June 2026 no dates, hosts, moderators, or number of debates have been set. Garrity called for seven debates.
Pennsylvania: Would be the first gubernatorial debate in the state since 2018; in 2022 Shapiro and Mastriano never agreed on terms.
Arizona: Primary is July 21, 2026, so the Republican nominee is not determined yet; a general-election debate before that date is impossible.

Arizona: As of July 7, 2026, Gov. Katie Hobbs has NOT committed to a general-election debate, saying she will address it 'after the primary.' She last debated in Oct 2018 and refused to debate Kari Lake in 2022.

Arizona: Citizens Clean Elections Commission debate schedule covered primary debates (GOP gubernatorial primary debate held June 17, 2026); general-election Clean Elections debates are traditionally held in October.
Wisconsin: Primary is August 11, 2026 (open seat, Evers retiring), so general-election nominees are not set until mid-August - a general-election debate before September is structurally impossible.
Wisconsin: Only primary-stage debates have occurred (e.g., WISN 12 Democratic primary debate). Likely general matchup: a Democrat (Barnes, Rodriguez, Brennan, etc.) vs Republican Tom Tiffany.
Overall conclusion: No general-election gubernatorial debate is scheduled before September 2026 in any of the four states.

data_points.metric: Oregon declined summer debate date (Oregon Newspaper Publishers Association)
Number of debates Kotek proposed (starting September)
Number of debates Garrity called for in Pennsylvania
Confirmed general-election debates scheduled before September 2026 across PA/OR/AZ/WI
